title: Project menu and Compose bootstrap UI

implementation.canonicalRuntime: One ProjectStore, history controller and AssetRepository bundle owns the active Compose project.
implementation.bootstrap: Validated PNG, JPEG or WebP import persists one Asset and opens the first canonical Composition and Layer through the A1-01 intent.
implementation.autosave: Serialized checkpoints, startup recovery and generation guards prevent stale completion state.
implementation.cleanup: Runtime debt is scoped by projectId and assetId; ASSET_NOT_FOUND is idempotent; global reconciliation runs only at safe lifecycle boundaries or with empty history.
implementation.boundary: Portable package open and the complete first-composition acceptance journey remain owned by A1-04.

browser.openProjectDisabledReason: Portable project opening is not available in Compose yet.
